violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. FMC arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Meatballs observed held at 118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Meatballs were reheated to 167 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Beef was observed held at 67 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
Single-use items (used gallon milk containers) observed being reused. Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026
Original delivery plastic observed on the ice machine, and stickers observed on some food storage containers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
